name: extractFirstJsonArray fence handling weaker than its object sibling
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L1-05] array extractor uses unanchored first-match fence with no parse-validated fallback, unlike extractFirstJsonObject; a non-array fenced block before the real array is mis-extracted. Fix: mirror the object extractor's anchored-fence + parse-validated fallback.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: extractFirstJsonArray uses the first markdown fence it sees and then scans only that body, unlike extractFirstJsonObject's anchored-wrapper handling plus parse-validated fallback over later candidates. Variants: (a) response is exactly a fenced JSON array, (b) a non-array fenced block appears before the real array, (c) unfenced prose precedes the first valid array; all should return the first parse-valid array and ignore invalid/non-array candidates. Regression test: apps/api/src/services/llm/extract-json.test.ts fails without the fix and passes with it, covering the three array extraction variants and preserving existing object extractor behavior.
